description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-button

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-button` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] Deferred P2 items documented in AUDIT.md: icon-only variant story, form submission integration test, loading+disabled combination test
- [ ] The ripple container z-index may interfere with absolutely positioned children in rare layouts

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817617205-upgzlb7bf`
title: Post-Audit: hx-button — follow-up items
